name: Amsterdam
industries: Banking, travel and payments technology, and the Schiphol logistics complex drive one of Europe's most agile-mature markets.
intro: Amsterdam's claim on agile history is direct — ING's enterprise-wide agile reorganisation here became the model banks worldwide copied — and the city's delivery market still runs ahead of the continent. Tech firms along the Zuidas and in the harbour district, the payments and travel giants born here, and the airport-logistics complex at Schiphol all hire Scrum-credentialed professionals as standard; programme managers with PMP anchor the infrastructure and energy-transition portfolios. Dutch directness extends to hiring: the certificate is checked first. Our live online weekend batch runs on the IST schedule at Dutch morning-to-afternoon hours, one weekend, workshop complete. Afterwards we support the exam application, drill full-length mocks, and keep the trainer on call for doubts until you pass. Dutch participants often bring their whole squad — group bookings for Amsterdam teams are common.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Amsterdam?
faq.a: Our current batches follow the Asia schedule: 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which converts to 05:30 AM – 02:30 PM GMT+2 in Amsterdam. You are welcome to join at those hours, or register interest and we will notify you first when batches in your region's hours are scheduled.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Amsterdam?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Amsterdam. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Netherlands?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Netherlands and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Amsterdam sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Netherlands accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Amsterdam — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Amsterdam: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
